title: Minimal Exploded Product Ad AI
sourceTitle: Minimal Exploded Product Ad AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium white-seamless exploded-view product advertisement built around compact wireless earbud charging case with smooth matte shell and visible internal battery core. Subject: hero product — premium product advertising, white seamless background, exploded view revealing internal mechanics, outer shell floating above the core, micro screws and supplies the swappable subject detail for this template. compact wireless earbud charging case with smooth matte shell and visible internal battery core is the hero object, shown with its outer shell floating above the core and internal mechanics visible in precise alignment. Scene: hero product — premium product advertising, white seamless background, exploded view revealing internal mechanics, outer shell floating above the core, micro screws and provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed square 1:1 macro product layout with the product centered, outer shell lifted above the core, micro screws and components suspended in air, and precise vertical alignment implied. Signature Elements: Preserved minimal exploded product ad source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic macro product photography with premium advertising polish, clean engineering clarity, tactile material realism, and 8K high-detail finish. Color Palette: Fixed white seamless background, product-native colors, subtle neutral shadows, clean metal or plastic highlights, and restrained technical clarity. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: 100mm macro lens look, f/8 clarity, square 1:1 crop, orthographic-feeling alignment, and sharp component detail. Materials: Outer shell, core, micro screws, internal components, seals, small mechanical parts, and surface finish remain physically believable and precisely spaced. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
